# GenyDL Resource Attribution

Ollama HUD vendors QML controls, theme files, fonts, icons, and image resources from GenyDL:

- Source: https://github.com/genyleap/genydl
- Upstream copyright notices are preserved in the copied QML files.
- License: GNU General Public License v3.0 or later. See `LICENSE` and `LICENSE.txt` in this directory.

The native Ollama HUD QML shell is app-specific, but it imports and reuses GenyDL `Core`, `Controls`, `Layout`, font, icon, and image resources.
